security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; frame-src https://hub.nimiq.com https://*.nimiq.com; child-src https://hub.nimiq.com https://*.nimiq.com

bundle.shortDescription: Local VeriLock lock verifier — file never leaves your device
bundle.longDescription: Open-source offline verifier for VeriLock on-chain locks. Hash files locally and verify against Nimiq lock transactions without uploading the document.
